text:
N0415B1 High-Risk Drug (Is Taking): Antianxiety CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident is taking antianxiety medication during the last seven days or since admission/entry or reentry if less than seven days. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
933 ANTINXTY_INDCTN_CD ANTINXTY_INDCTN_CD N0415B2 High-Risk Drug (Indication): Antianxiety CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident is taking antianxiety medication and whether there is an indication noted for all
